payload.label: picture frame
payload.long_description: Partial wall-mounted rectangular picture frame with a thin black outer border and white mat surrounding a faint sketch-like print; lower-right area is occluded by a translucent curtain or railing in the foreground and the image appears slightly soft — roughly 2.5 meters from the camera.
